---
title: "Research"
---

My work sits at the intersection of development, environmental, and labour economics, with a focus on welfare in developing economies.

## Working Papers

*Coming soon.*

## Publications

**Price elasticities of residential electricity demand: Estimates from household panel data in Bangladesh**
Balarama, H., Islam, A., Kim, J. S., & Wang, L. C.
*Energy Economics*, 92, 2020.
[https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eneco.2020.104937](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eneco.2020.104937)

## Research Experience

**Yale Economic Growth Center** · Tobin Predoctoral Fellow
Working with Professor Rohini Pande on the gender portfolio, focusing on women's mobile access and economic outcomes in developing countries.

**Monash University** · Laboratory Assistant and Research Assistant
Worked across multiple supervisors on projects spanning energy and environment, health and COVID-19, and K-12 education. Responsibilities included data cleaning and processing from census, survey, and administrative sources; code development for reproducible analysis; survey design and primary data collection support; grant applications and policy documentation; and statistical analysis and literature reviews.

## Research Interests

- Development economics
- Environmental economics
- Labour economics

## Contact

For draft requests or research inquiries, email [h.balarama@lse.ac.uk](mailto:h.balarama@lse.ac.uk).
